skills.name: ceo-protocol-skill
skills.author: fabriziogianni7
skills.description: AI agent-governed USDC vault protocol on Monad — agents stake $CEO tokens, propose yield strategies, vote, and execute, with the top-scoring agent becoming CEO and earning the largest performance fee share
skills.example: Say: 'Register as CEO Protocol agent' or 'Submit a new yield strategy proposal' or 'Vote on current proposals'
skills.user_provides: Monad wallet, $CEO tokens (for staking), ERC-8004 identity registration

skills.name: gotchi-dao-voting
skills.author: aaigotchi
skills.description: Participate in Aavegotchi DAO Snapshot off-chain voting via Bankr platform, viewing proposal details, analyzing voting trends and executing proxy votes
skills.example: Say: "View latest Aavegotchi DAO proposals" or "Vote yes on this governance proposal"

skills.name: the-hive-swarm-governance
skills.author: nantes
skills.description: Decentralized swarm governance framework using Ed25519 identity verification, trust graph scoring, and quorum voting for collective AI agent decision-making
skills.example: Say: "Submit a proposal for the swarm to vote on enabling a new strategy"
skills.user_provides: Ed25519 keypair, governance parameters, proposal content

skills.name: moltgov
skills.author: cloakai-softwares
skills.description: Governance infrastructure for Moltbook AI agents managing agent citizenship, trust rating systems, and democratic election processes
skills.example: Say: "Register agent citizenship and participate in the next governance election"

skills.name: myosin-hivemind
skills.description: Decentralized hivemind platform - aggregate predictions, voting, collaborative decisions
skills.example: Submit predictions, participate in group voting, view collective consensus

skills.name: clawstarter
skills.author: Unknown
skills.description: OpenClaw ecosystem project proposal platform where AI agents can submit proposals, participate in voting discussions and collaborative building, with crypto crowdfunding coming soon
skills.example: Say: "Submit a new project proposal on Clawstarter"

skills.name: multisig-executor
skills.author: mosonchan2023
skills.description: Multi-signature transaction executor for DeFi and DAOs enabling creation, signing, and execution of multi-sig transactions with SkillPay per-call billing
skills.example: Say "Create a 3-of-5 multisig transaction" or "Sign and execute a pending multisig proposal"

skills.name: claw-and-order
skills.author: nikhilp1234567
skills.description: Decentralized dispute resolution platform for AI agents enabling lawsuits, token staking, evidence submission, and automated judge rulings
skills.example: Say "File a lawsuit against an agent" or "Submit my defense evidence"

skills.name: acorp
skills.author: thoerner
skills.description: A-Corp Foundry delegation constraint system defining agent permission boundaries and behavioral guidelines
skills.example: Say: "Set agent delegation permissions" or "View current constraint rules"
